Final Arbitration Summary

Decision: approved

Reason: Council majority approved the engineering result.

Vote tally: {"approve":3,"deny":0,"veto":0,"objection":1,"abstain":0}

Objections

  • Patch scope diverged from plan — Implementer touched a broader validator surface than Architect approved.

Architect

Decision: approve

Confidence: 95%

Budget: 1.20 / 3.00

Reason: Architecture plan issued for council execution.

  "artifactType": "plan",
  "planId": "section48-disagreement-plan",
  "strategy": "patch the logging drift without broad refactor",

    "avoid cross-module refactor",
    "re-run proof lane"
